decisions.rationale: The observation resolves to its own base_record_id (corridor_34th-st-busway), which is already the closest matching canonical record: same street (34th Street), same borough (Manhattan), and the source 20110118_34th_cac3_slides is already listed in that record's source_ids with the matching alias "corridor_34th-st-manhattan-20110118". No different registry record is a closer match. Per the rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the 34th Street Transitway corridor in Manhattan, New York City. The corridor is shown as a red and white striped line running diagonally from the top left to the bottom right. Key landmarks and streets labeled include Twelfth Avenue/Javits Center, Eleventh Avenue, Tenth Avenue, Ninth Avenue, Eighth Avenue (with A, C, E bus lines), Seventh Avenue/Penn Station (with 1, 2, 3 bus lines), Sixth Avenue/Broadway/Herald Square (with B, D, F, M, N, Q, R bus lines), Madison/Fifth Avenue, Park Avenue (with 6 bus line), Third/Lexington Avenue, Second Avenue, First Avenue, and E 34th Street Ferry Terminal.
